message: SQL injection via string interpolation in /api/users/:id — req.params.id is concatenated directly into SQL query without parameterization
Endpoint /api/admin/delete-user lacks authentication middleware — any unauthenticated request can delete arbitrary users
SQL injection via string interpolation in /api/admin/delete-user — userId is concatenated directly into DELETE query without parameterization
Arbitrary code execution via eval() in /api/config/transform — req.body.expression is passed directly to eval()
SQL injection via string interpolation in /api/search — req.query.q is concatenated directly into SQL query without parameterization
SQL injection in /api/login — username and password are interpolated directly into SQL query, enabling authentication bypass
Login endpoint /api/login returns user ID as token and leaks user role in response — exposes internal identifiers and privilege level
Remote code execution via child_process.execSync() in /api/run — req.body.cmd is passed directly to shell execution
